examples: Then the youth went to the gallows, sat down beneath it, and waited till evening came.
Implication in a murder finally brought him to the gallows.
"It is all done," said he, "and the witch is already hanging on the gallows."
"Theaters were in the disreputable part of town, with pimps and gallows and bear-baiting, " she said.
The skies are gray, and a wrought-iron tipple sits at the mouth of the mine like a gallows.
